generated_oml:
prefix DTDFVocab: http://example.org/DTDFVocab#
prefix base: http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#

instance AirQualityManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "runtime visualization, simulation, and prediction capabilities for indoor air quality management in virus spread prevention scenarios, enabling data-driven decision support through real-time monitoring and scenario modeling"
]

instance OptimalControl : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "optimal control for system optimization",
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityManagementInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLogging : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "historical data logging for operational data recording",
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityManagementInsight
]

instance DataVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "data visualization for real-time monitoring",
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityManagementInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidation : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "continuous validation to ensure model accuracy against physical system data",
    DTDFVocab:provides AirQualityManagementInsight
]

instance Fusion360 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for creating CAD models",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualization
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python for developing kinematic model and services",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControl, HistoricalDataLogging, DataVisualization, ContinuousValidation
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB as time-series database for historical data storage",
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLogging
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization dashboards",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualization
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerizing components to ensure portability",
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControl, HistoricalDataLogging, DataVisualization, ContinuousValidation
]

instance Mosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto as MQTT broker for real-time data communication",
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidation, DataVisualization
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "for tracking crane movement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "for wind speed measurement",
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "for data acquisition and transmission",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ArduinoDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance ArduinoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "swing angle measurements from physical crane",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "wind speed measurements from anemometer",
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance ArduinoData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "data acquired and transmitted by Arduino microcontroller",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ArduinoDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "geometric representation of the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "motion simulation for the gantry crane",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Python
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "physical gantry crane in laboratory environment"
]

instance Controller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "controller for the gantry crane system"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Python application for collecting data from physical crane and transmitting via MQTT"
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "application for logging crane state data to TimescaleDB"
]

instance GantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "lab-scale gantry crane system comprising a physical crane and its controller, designed for research and educational purposes. It operates in a controlled laboratory environment and is characterized by public availability, reliance on open-source software, and suitability for validating digital twin methodologies such as continuous validation, fault detection, and system evolution.",
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, Controller, PhysicalCraneInterface, LoggingApplication
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Trajectory Generator Service creates optimal movement trajectories using a crane kinematics model, which are transmitted to the Control Application (a Python application). The Control Application then utilizes the Physical Crane Interface to send control commands to the physical crane hardware, enabling precise movement execution based on digital twin-generated plans."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system utilizes the C4 Model for architectural visualization, with containerized components via Docker. Key technologies include TimescaleDB for time-series data storage, Grafana for visualization dashboards, and Eclipse Mosquitto as the MQTT message broker for inter-component communication."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares real-time trajectory data with simulated predictions using predefined threshold values to detect discrepancies and trigger adaptive responses."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol is used for inter-service communication through the MQTT Broker. The network topology is centralized around the MQTT Broker for message routing. No details on bandwidth, latency, redundancy, or security protocols are provided in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer. The Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard are containerized using Docker with a docker compose file for deployment. Python components are packaged as installable modules via pip, allowing for local execution without cloud dependencies. This setup supports a single-machine on-premise deployment model with Docker-based containerization."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems is achieved through MQTT protocol using Eclipse Mosquitto as the message broker, enabling real-time data exchange between physical sensors and the digital twin components."
]
